text.title: use-case-mapping Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for use-case-mapping as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Use cases drift from reality if not maintained alongside code. Unmaintained docs become fiction.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Treat them as living docs, updated when code changes. Outdated use cases mislead new team members.

failure-mode.description: Over-specification kills agility. Too much detail about screens locks design too early.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Keep at user-goal level by default. Subfunctional detail prevents responsive design changes.

failure-mode.description: System actor abstraction confuses agents. They invent system agency where there is none.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Enforce actor-first perspective in prompts. Require actor to initiate, system to respond.
